---
name: 🐛 Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve OpenBridge
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug, help wanted
assignees: ''

---

## 📝 Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 🔄 Steps to Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## 🎯 Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## 🖼️ Screenshots/Logs
If applicable, add screenshots or console traceback logs to help explain the problem.

## 💻 Environment Setup
* OS: [e.g. Windows, macOS]
* Browser: [e.g. Chrome, Firefox]
* Node.js Version: [e.g. v18.16.0]
